meta.title: Seizures in brain metastases (Makkawi model)
meta.authors: Makkawi S, Alqurashi RM, Aljabri A, et al.
meta.outcome: Probability of developing a seizure in a patient with brain metastases, from 3 factors (single static estimate)
meta.cff_info:
What this shows. A model (Makkawi et al., Seizure 2025) estimating the probability of developing a seizure in a patient with brain metastases, from three factors. Single-centre, 272 patients (overall seizure rate 29%).

How to read it

  • Strongest driver by far is a supratentorial cortical metastasis; then leptomeningeal disease and female sex. A patient with none has ~2% risk.

Use with caution. Small single-centre cohort, internally validated only, with very wide confidence intervals (cortical OR 28, 95% CI 9–85) — the estimates are unstable and hypothesis-generating. It gives a single cumulative-risk estimate (no time horizon), and cortical vs leptomeningeal involvement are essentially mutually exclusive. Compare with the BMERS score. Demonstration tool.

predictors.name: Supratentorial cortical metastasis
predictors.assess: A metastasis involving the supratentorial cortex. By far the strongest factor (OR 28) — but the estimate is imprecise (wide CI). Essentially mutually exclusive with leptomeningeal disease.

predictors.name: Leptomeningeal metastasis
predictors.assess: Leptomeningeal metastatic disease (OR 11). Essentially mutually exclusive with a parenchymal cortical lesion.

predictors.name: Female sex
predictors.assess: Female sex was associated with higher seizure risk (OR 2.7), though it was an unstable predictor on bootstrapping.

model.note: Single static cumulative-risk estimate (no time horizon). Small single-centre cohort (n=272), internal validation only, wide CIs. Cortical and leptomeningeal involvement are essentially mutually exclusive — selecting both represents a combination barely seen in the data.
model.viz_info: Each factor adds its published log-odds to a logistic model; the sum plus the intercept gives the probability of a seizure.

provenance.source: Makkawi 2025 Seizure Table 4 (Score-Card model β + intercept -3.8047) + Table 5 (score bands) — doi 10.1016/j.seizure.2025.05.013, PMID 40440856
provenance.notes: Logistic intercept -3.8047; β female 0.9836, cortical 3.3349, leptomeningeal 2.4159 (all binary). Verified: all-no 2.2%, female+cortical 62.6%, female+lepto 40.0%. Baseline 29.4%. AUC 0.82. SMALL/FRAGILE: n=272 (dev ~218), cortical OR 28 CI 9-85, female unstable on bootstrap, no external validation, no time horizon. Overlaps BMERS. Built 2026-07-08 on user request; candidate to grey in quality review.
